RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT CALAVERAS ASBESTOS, LTD.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: OFF CALENDAR per moving party. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-08-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Christopher Andreas, Esq. Brayton Purcell (415) 898-1555 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Manley
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT CALAVERAS ASBESTOS, LTD.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DENIED. Moving party did not mail its moving papers until 05/27/04. CCP 437c(a) mandates that a party moving for summary judgment must give the opposing party 75 days notice. An additional 5 days notice is required if service is made via mail. Defendant only gave 42 days notice. Order signed. (301/AS/) Reporter: Valerie Papale, CSR #6899
